questions.question: Adults thought it stupid, but millennials knew it was art. This show about a sea sponge and friends in Bikini Bottom was a billion-dollar franchise.
questions.answer: Spongebob Squarepants (Go ahead and sing the song)

questions.question: This first-person shooter game debuted in 2003, providing World War II missions from U.S., British, and Soviet perspectives.
Fresh out of the Mickey Mouse Club, she released 'Genie in a Bottle' and became the 'Best New Artist' in 2000.
In 1993, terrorists exploded bombs in what New York City building parking garage?
What movie character coined the iconic phrase 'As if'?
